scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend && npm run typecheck -w @scanpdf/mobile && npm run lint -w @scanpdf/desktop
scripts.apps:build: npm run extension:build && npm run export:android -w @scanpdf/mobile && npm run export:ios -w @scanpdf/mobile && npm run desktop:build
